overview: Hell Maggot is a Normal-class Beast/Demon/Worm monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 10 HP, 10 physical damage, 70 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 100% ratio (100 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Nightmare.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Bleeding
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Bleeding icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Bleeding Nightmare
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Bleeding Nightmare icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-2000), Light (-2000), Divine (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
